description_long: This is a rectangular, upright beverage carton with a predominantly white and blue color scheme, featuring a realistic image of sliced guava and water splashes on the front. The front label reads 'Paradise Guava' in bold blue and white text, with additional branding and a green 'Natural' badge. The sides of the carton display nutritional information, a barcode, and product details in smaller text. The top of the carton is sealed with a small, white, screw-on plastic cap positioned off-center. The surface of the carton appears to be made of laminated paperboard, giving it a slightly glossy finish. The overall design is modern and clean, suitable for a commercial bottled water or juice product.
description: A rectangular beverage carton with a white screw cap, blue and white branding, and guava imagery on the front. The carton has a glossy, laminated surface and detailed product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the carton, with some branding and product information visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Paradise Guava' branding, guava imagery, and main label details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring a barcode and additional product information.
description_view_3: Back view showing extensive nutritional facts and text in a column format.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Paradise Guava' in large blue and white text, with a red logo above and a green 'Natural' badge. Sliced guava imagery and water splash graphics are present. Sides and back have nutritional facts, barcode, and product details in small black text.
attribute_cap_type: White screw cap, small and cylindrical, positioned off-center on the top, with a ridged edge for grip.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the carton material does not allow visibility of the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, slightly raised neck with threading for the screw cap; no additional flares or ridges visible.
